title: triphysaria eriantha subsp. eriantha
intro: Triphysaria eriantha subsp. eriantha, also known as fairy lantern, is a flowering plant species in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) that is native to California in the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. Triphysaria eriantha subsp. eriantha has been reported to have various health benefits, including antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a raw herb or added to capsules and other supplements.
